useCDATA.title: Use CDATA
useCDATA.description: Create CDATA sections in the output file

localeId.title: Name for locale ID element
localeId.description: Name of the <attribute> element containing the locale ID

sourceId.title: Name for source ID element
sourceId.description: Name of the <attribute> element containing the source ID

partsNames.default: SMCCONTENT-TITLE, SMCCONTENT-ABSTRACT, SMCCONTENT-BODY, SMCCONTENT-ALT, SMCCHANNELDESCRIPTOR-TITLE, SMCCHANNELDESCRIPTOR-ABSTRACT, SMCCHANNELDESCRIPTOR-ALT, SMCLINKCOLLECTIONS-LINKCOLLECTION-TITLE, SMCLINKCOLLECTIONS-LINKCOLLECTION-DESCRIPTION, SMCLINKS-TITLE, SMCLINKS-ABSTRACT, SMCLINKS-BODY, SMCLINKS-ALT
partsNames.title: Names of the <attribute> elements to extract
partsNames.description: Comma-separated list of the names of the <attribute> elements to extract.

partsConfigurations.default: default, okf_html, okf_html, default, default, okf_html, default, default, okf_html, default, okf_html, okf_html, default
partsConfigurations.title: Corresponding filter configurations (or 'default')
partsConfigurations.description: Comma-separated list of the filter configurations to use, use 'default' for none

enabled.title: Enable Inline Code Detection
enabled.description: Enable pattern-based detection of inline codes

mergeAdjacent.title: Merge Adjacent Codes
mergeAdjacent.description: Merge consecutive inline codes into a single placeholder

moveBoundaryCodes.title: Move Boundary Codes
moveBoundaryCodes.description: Move codes at segment boundaries to the skeleton

codeFinderRules.title: Code Finder Rules
codeFinderRules.description: Regex patterns for inline code detection

rules.title: Patterns
rules.description: List of regex patterns to detect inline codes

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Regex pattern for inline code detection

sample.title: Sample Text
sample.description: Sample text to test patterns against

useAllRulesWhenTesting.title: Test All Rules Together
useAllRulesWhenTesting.description: Test all rules together or individually

simplifierRules.title: Simplifier Rules
simplifierRules.description: Rules for simplifying inline code representation
